mapper.sql: id, type, item_id, item_name, stock, unit, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM inventory WHERE type = #{type} AND item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory (type, item_id, item_name, stock, unit) VALUES (#{type}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{stock}, #{unit})
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(stock) as totalStock, SUM(CASE WHEN stock = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as outOfStockCount, SUM(CASE WHEN stock > 0 AND stock <= 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lowStockCount FROM inventory WHERE status = 1 AND type = #{type}

SELECT FROM inventory WHERE type = 'vaccine' AND status = 1
AND item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT FROM inventory WHERE type = 'product' AND status = 1
AND item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC
